heading: Distribution of schedules
label: 4305 Distribution of schedules

children.text: made available to any person upon request;
provided to any potential customer before an account is opened or a service is rendered; and

provided to the depositor, in the case of any time deposit which has a maturity of more than 30 days is renewable at maturity without notice from the depositor, at least 30 days before the date of maturity.1So in original. Probably should be followed by “and”.1

children.heading: Distribution in case of certain initial deposits
children.label: b Distribution in case of certain initial deposits

children.text: a depositor is not physically present at an office of a depository institution at the time an initial deposit is accepted with respect to an account established by or for such person; and
the schedule required under has not been furnished previously to such depositor,section 4303(a) of this title

children.heading: Distribution of notice of certain changes
children.label: c Distribution of notice of certain changes

children.text: any change is made in any term or condition which is required to be disclosed in the schedule required under with respect to any account; andsection 4303(a) of this title
the change may reduce the yield or adversely affect any holder of the account,

children.heading: Distribution in case of accounts established by more than 1 individual or by a group
children.label: d Distribution in case of accounts established by more than 1 individual or by a group
children.text: If an account is established by more than 1 individual or for a person other than an individual, any distribution described in this section with respect to such account meets the requirements of this section if the distribution is made to 1 of the individuals who established the account or 1 individual representative of the person on whose behalf such account was established.

children.heading: Notice to account holders as of effective date of regulations
children.label: e Notice to account holders as of effective date of regulations
children.text: For any account for which the depository institution delivers an account statement on a quarterly or more frequent basis, the depository institution shall include on or with the first regularly scheduled mailing sent after the end of the 6-month period beginning on the date of publication of regulations issued by the Bureau in final form, a statement that the account holder has the right to request an account schedule containing the terms, charges, and interest rates of the account, and that the account holder may wish to request such an account schedule.
